things.name: Masai Mara Safari
things.description: World's greatest wildlife reserve - the Great Migration of 1.5 million wildebeest

things.name: Nairobi National Park
things.description: Lions and rhinos with the Nairobi skyline backdrop - unique urban national park

things.name: David Sheldrick Elephant Orphanage
things.description: Meet baby elephants rescued from poachers during the 11am feeding and mud bath

things.name: Giraffe Centre
things.description: Endangered Rothschild giraffes that you can feed and interact with at eye level

things.name: Karen Blixen Museum
things.description: Out of Africa author's farm house perfectly preserved as she left it in 1931

things.name: Bomas of Kenya
things.description: Traditional homesteads of 42 Kenyan tribes with evening cultural performances

things.name: National Museum of Kenya
things.description: East Africa's finest museum with human evolution fossils from the Great Rift Valley

things.name: Nairobi Railway Museum
things.description: Locomotives from the 1890s Uganda Railway - the Lunatic Line that built East Africa

things.name: Carnivore Restaurant
things.description: Legendary restaurant serving game meats - ostrich, zebra and kudu on a Maasai sword

things.name: Maasai Market
things.description: Roaming craft market selling authentic Maasai beadwork, soapstone and woodcarvings
